title: One Enough Lib
description: A Lib for simplified development of the OE series
body:
This mod is a development library designed specifically for the author's **OE (OneEnough)** mod series. It is also a required dependency for several of the author's other projects.

When installed as a standalone mod, it features **holiday greetings** (similar to Toast notifications) that appear when logging in on specific days. This feature can be toggled via the in-game configuration screen and has **no impact on actual gameplay**.
